name: EssentialBroadband
description: Customer is enquiring about, applying for, or asking about eligibility for the Essential Broadband (social tariff) product — a reduced-cost broadband package for customers receiving UK government benefits such as Universal Credit, Pension Credit, or disability benefits.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I'm on {benefitType} and need help with my broadband costs
Can I get the {tariffName} ?
Sign me up for {tariffName}
I receive {benefitType} , is there a cheaper broadband option for me?
How do I apply for the {tariffName} ?
I'm on benefits and someone told me I can get cheaper broadband
{benefitType} broadband please
Do you have a reduced broadband rate for people on {benefitType} ?
I'd like to switch my package to {tariffName}
My {benefitType} means I can't afford my current broadband
What's the broadband deal for people on government benefits?
I heard Ofcom says you have to offer a {tariffName}
Help me get the affordable broadband for benefit claimants
I claim {benefitType} and want to know about {tariffName}
Am I eligible for a reduced broadband package?
Put me on the {tariffName} because I get {benefitType}
yeah so basically I'm on {benefitType} and I can't really afford what I'm paying now for internet
Someone at the job centre said I should ask about {tariffName}
I want to check if my {benefitType} qualifies me for cheaper broadband
Is there a low income broadband package available?
Change my current plan to the {tariffName}
I've just started receiving {benefitType} and need to reduce what I'm paying
What broadband packages do you do for people who are struggling financially?
{tariffName}
I get {benefitType} — what's the cheapest you can do for broadband?
